evals.prompt: I have a Next.js app at /Users/yoenzhang/Downloads/velt-test-demo-scaffolding with Velt set up. I want to add an activity feed to the document pages at /dashboard/[docId] that shows all collaboration events (comments added, edits, etc.). The activity feed should be in a sidebar panel that users can toggle. Use the built-in VeltActivityLog component.
evals.expected_output: VeltActivityLog component rendered (not conditionally — use display:none for toggling), activity feed in sidebar, toggle button, proper document setup.

assertions.text: VeltActivityLog component is rendered in the page
VeltActivityLog is NOT conditionally rendered with && or ternary — uses display:none or CSS for toggling
shadowDom={false} is set on VeltActivityLog for CSS customization
Document context is set using setDocuments or useSetDocument with the docId
Uses authProvider pattern on VeltProvider, not identify()

evals.prompt: Add a custom activity logging system to my Next.js app at /Users/yoenzhang/Downloads/velt-test-demo-scaffolding. When users perform actions in the dashboard (like updating a task status or assigning someone), I want to log those as custom activity records in Velt's activity feed. Use the useActivityUtils hook to create custom activity entries with action types and metadata.
evals.expected_output: useActivityUtils hook used, createActivity called with proper ActivityRecord structure including actionType, actionUser, and timestamp.

assertions.text: useActivityUtils() hook is imported and used
createActivity() is called with an ActivityRecord object
ActivityRecord includes actionUser with userId and name
Uses authProvider pattern on VeltProvider, not identify()

evals.prompt: I want to subscribe to real-time activity updates in my Next.js app at /Users/yoenzhang/Downloads/velt-test-demo-scaffolding. On the dashboard page, I need to show a live count of recent activities and display the latest 5 activity items with user info and timestamps. Use the useAllActivities hook to get the data.
evals.expected_output: useAllActivities hook used with proper null handling, activity count displayed, latest items rendered with user info and timestamps.

assertions.text: useAllActivities() hook is imported and used
Handles the null loading state from useAllActivities (checks for null before rendering)
Renders individual activity items with user info
Uses authProvider pattern on VeltProvider, not identify()
